persistence_conclusion: MSI KLC keyboards have persist_changes=0 and has_onboard_macros=0 -> NO onboard profile storage. Both SteelSeries GG and MSI Center drive them live (stateless). The blue is the keyboard firmware power-on default reasserted by the EC on brightness events. Only Linux persistence = re-apply on event (hook/daemon).
effect_vocabulary_note: lighting_templates: groups[{codes,data}] where codes are key-group names (row1..,functionRow,everything) or HID usages; data.type in {steadyColor{r,g,b}, effect}. effects[]: effectType, has_direction, direction_type(radial|horizontal|vertical), focal_x/y, speed, scale, colors[] at positions[] (gradient).
